text: Fig P. Four-point roll on the upline, full roll at the top, positive snap on exit.
Half Cuban. Three-quarter opposite roll on the 45 upline, outside loop, half roll on exit. Exit inverted.
Loop. Outside entry, three-quarter opposite roll and quarter roll at the top.
Hammerhead. Half roll on the upline, three-quarter negative snap then three-quarter roll on the downline.
270 Degree Roller. Three full rolls inside.
Double Humpty. Half roll on the downline, outside loop, three-quarter positive snap on the upline. Exit inverted.
Half Reverse Cuban. One and a half negative snaps on the downline, inside loop, half roll opposite half roll on exit. Exit inverted.
Spin. One and three-quarter inverted turns. Quarter roll, pull to exit upright.
Tear Drop. Three-quarter negative snap and quarter roll on the upline, positive snap at the bottom.
Sharks Tooth. One and a quarter roll, opposite quarter roll on the 45 upline. Half roll on the downline.
